publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-06-25 00:11:32 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: The collection contains unique ephemera, photographs, correspondence, publications, and administrative files shedding light on the workings of an independent punk label through press releases, contracts, and fan mail. The collection also features fanzines and a selection of fliers and posters.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The collection contains unique ephemera, photographs, correspondence, publications, and administrative files shedding light on the workings of an independent punk label through press releases, contracts, and fan mail. The collection also features fanzines and a selection of fliers and posters.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Michael Whittaker was a publicist for SST Records, an American independent record label formed in 1978 in Long Beach, California by musician Greg Ginn of Black Flag. SST would release all Black Flag's records until the band split up in 1986. SST was one of the more influential of the American independent record labels of the 1980s, releasing not only hardcore punk music, but also albums that were instrumental in the development of American alternative rock, such as those by the Meat Puppets, Soundgarden, Sonic Youth, and Dinosaur Jr.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Michael Whittaker SST Records collection, #8135. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Black Flag, Saint Vitus, Hüsker Dü, Negativland posters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains SST press releases which consist of band bios, album and tour announcements. Also includes original press release paste ups.

did.unittitle: SST promo flyers, catalogs, and stickers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains notes, empty envelopes, and other miscellaneous documents related to SST.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains stapled packets of press photocopies about various SST releases.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains 8x10 promo photos, live photos, and photo shoot outtakes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains outtakes from Black Flag's "Damaged" album cover shoot and contact sheets of Minutemen and Black Flag performances.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of Black Flag, DC3, Dinosaur Jr., Hüsker Dü, Lawndale, Meat Puppets, Minutemen, Nig Heist, Saccharine Trust, and Saint Vitus.

did.unittitle: The Duplex Planet press and script

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied press clippings and a script for Greenberger's play, "Tramps in Bloom".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1987 Graceland News Tenth Anniversary Collector's Edition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Missing front cover. Inscribed by author.

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: NW Arkansas Chapter of the National Blues Foundation

did.unittitle: The Retail Adventures of Kali and Rex Calendar for 1996

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Vol. 1, No. 1, 3, 5, 9-10, 11 (two copies), 12 (two copies). Vol. 2, No. 1, 4 (two copies), 5 (two copies), 9, 10 (two copies), 11 (two copies). Vol. 3, No. 1 (three copies), 2, 3, 4 (two copies), 5

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Beyond" issue and "Then Reality Kicks In…" issue (three copies)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "Death on Drugs" card set, "Terrorist Attack" educational cards, and "Legalize today…Get high tonight" embroidered patch.

did.unittitle: Independent Project Records catalog and releases

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Savage Republic "Recordings From Live Performances, 1981-1983" 10" record (SR-33890) and Woo "A La Luna" CD (CD-6488).

did.unittitle: Lloyd Cole and Cocteau Twins Cornerstore agreements

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains promo materials and press kits for bands that were not on SST. Includes 3 flexi discs originally included in issues of Bucketful of Brains SR-33887-33889.

did.unittitle: Slash Records advertising proofs and catalog

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains tour itineraries for Los Lobos and Faith No More tours.
